parameters.subject: =Your Invoice for Order #{{ $('GMAIL TEMPLATE').item.json.order_id }} from NovaStore
parameters.message:
=Dear {{ $('GMAIL TEMPLATE').item.json.customer_name }},

Thank you for shopping with NovaStore! We have successfully received your order #{{ $('GMAIL TEMPLATE').item.json.order_id }}.

Please find your detailed invoice attached to this email in PDF format. You can keep this document for your records and future reference.

If you have any questions about your order, payment, or delivery, feel free to reply to this email or contact our support team. We are always here to help!

Thank you for choosing NovaStore. We hope to serve you again soon!

Best regards,
The NovaStore Team
support@novastore.com

values.content:
=You are an expert e-commerce product description writer. I will provide you with the Product Name, its existing Short Description, and the current Description. Your tasks: 1. Use the Tavily Search tool to search the internet for detailed features, specifications, and real-world benefits about this product (based on the product name). 2. Combine the given "Short Description" and "Current Description" with the information found via Tavily. 3. Write a detailed, SEO-friendly, and compelling "Enhanced Long Description" (at least 150 words). 4. The description must be well-structured with HTML paragraphs (

), bullet points (

  • ), and bold () for key features. Output Format: Return ONLY the generated HTML description. Do not add any extra text, intro, or conclusion. Here is the product information: - Product Name: {{ $json.Name }} - Short Description: {{ $json["Short Description"] }} - Current Description: {{ $json.Description }}

options.systemMessage:
=You are an expert data extraction assistant for an e-commerce store.
Your task is to analyze the provided WooCommerce invoice/order JSON data and extract specific fields accurately.

You must extract the following information:
1. Invoice Number (Order Number).
2. Subtotal (The total price of all items before shipping, tax, and discounts).
3. Tax (The total tax amount for the order).
4. A list of all products purchased in this order. For each product, extract:
   - Product Name
   - SKU
   - Quantity

If a field is missing in the JSON, return "0" for numbers and "N/A" for strings. 
You must strictly output the result using the Structured Output Parser tool provided to you. Do not include any conversational text, only the structured data.

parameters.content:
ORDER & INVOICE AUTOMATION (WooCommerce → Email)

Triggers automatically when a new order is placed.

- Calculate new stock over order quantity.
- Generates PDF invoices.
- Sends automated invoice emails to customers.
- Updates stock levels based on order quantities.

#  PRODUCT HANDLE AUTOMATION

Sync Google Sheet data with WooCommerce automatically.

-  **Reads** product list from Google Sheet automatically.
-  **Creates** new WP products.
-  **Updates** existing products.
-  **Deletes** products no longer in the sheet.
- Generate new enhanced description and retrive product photo from cloudinary.

DAILY SALES REPORT GENERATOR

Automated email report sent to the admin every morning.
- Aggregates daily orders.
- Calculates total sales, taxes, and item counts.
- Delivers a structured summary directly to the admin inbox.
- Best selling product.
- New vs returning customers.
- Total refunds.
- Link to all invoices.

AI-POWERED INVOICE SUMMARIZER

Automated invoice processing pipeline:
- Fetches outgoing invoice emails (PDFs) via Gmail.
- Extracts text content from PDF attachments.
- Filters out previously processed invoices.
- Uses OpenAI or Gemini to generate a structured summary.
- Appends invoices to the Google Sheet.
- Calculate total sales, total taxes and total sold in sheet
